$comment: Curated static selection for launch-board-01. planning-board-01 supplies the board baseline; the implementation adds release-themed local seed cards, search, column filtering, a full create/edit/delete flow via a manage-items panel and Dialog, and localStorage persistence with a Reset board action.

assumptions: planning-board-01 is the stocked planning-board screen pattern and its column-transition model fits the application.

board-column-01 provides the drag-and-drop and move controls that change a card's workflow status; it is not modified, so edit and delete are surfaced through a separate manage-items panel and shared Dialog instead.
All cards and counts derive from one local seed set plus localStorage-persisted moves, edits, deletions, and additions.
risks: No project-tracking service, workflow permissions, or backend persistence is connected; state lives in this browser's localStorage only.
Cross-column keyboard reordering is delegated to the board and is not a full keyboard drag alternative; the manage-items panel's column selector is the keyboard-accessible path to move a card.
Clearing site data or using a different browser loses the board; Reset board is the only recovery path back to the seed.
